💁‍♀️CUSTOMER CARE & QUALITY GUARANTEE:

- Suitable for All Stove Including Induction

- One Year Seller Warranty

- 15 Days Return Policy

-3 days delivery

👍FEATURES:

Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe.Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans.

✅ Stable material: Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, which is more durable and high-temperature resistant than ordinary PTFE-coated pots (which can only withstand 250°C).

✅ Safe and healthy: Ceramic coating is a non-metallic inorganic coating with stable performance.

✅ Non-stick: Ceramics have super non-stick properties; you can fry eggs without oil,

✅ Easy to clean: After use, just wipe it clean with a damp cloth or napkin to protect your hands. Redchef makes cooking fun and easy!

✅ Explosion-proof glass pot lid: anti-fall, not easy to break, can be switched between hot and cold, with a high safety factor.

📦PACKAGE

- 12 Pcs Set：1x 26cm Deep Frying Pan +1x 26cm Frying Pan With lid + 1x 24cm Casserole With lid +1x 20cm Frying Pan + 1x 18cm Saucepan With lid

Excellent cooking results in total style

Exceptional cookware and kitchen tools that combine performance with aesthetics: The WMF Diadem Plus Cookware Set adds a touch of refinement to your home cooking, with elegant design and high-quality results every day. Our premium cookware boasts outstanding durability, expertly crafted from high-quality Cromargan®: stainless steel 18/10: dishwasher safe, acid-resistant and oven-proof up to 200 °C (lid up to 130°C), ensuring full flavor and performance that's built to last. Discover outstanding pots and pans that bring together convenient features like easy-pouring wide rims, exquisite design with graceful curves, stylish knob handles, and a sleek chrome aesthetic for timeless elegance day after day. This starter set offers everything you need for a fully equipped kitchen: Braising pan 20cm with elegant glass lid, soup pots 16/20/24cm with elegant glass lids, saucepan 16cm.

5-piece set:

- 16cm saucepan

- 20cm low casserole with lid

- 16cm high casserole with lid

- 20cm high casserole with lid

- 24cm high casserole with lid

2-piece set:

- 24cm frying pan

- 20cm high casserole with lid

It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe. Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans. ✅Oven Safe: The product comes with a detachable handle, allowing it to be used in the oven after removing the handle. 💁‍♀️CUSTOMER CARE & QUALITY GUARANTEE:

- Suitable for All Stove Including Induction

- One Year Seller Warranty.

- 15 Days Return Policy

-3 days delivery

👍FEATURES:

Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe. Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans.

✅Oven Safe: The product comes with a detachable handle, allowing it to be used in the oven after removing the handle. The Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, making it more durable and heat-resistant compared to standard PTFE-coated pans, which can only handle up to 250°C.

✅Dishwasher Safe: After removing the handle, the cookware can be placed directly in the dishwasher. The ceramic coating on the bottom of the pan ensures it won’t be corroded by detergents.

✅Non-Stick: The ceramic coating provides excellent non-stick performance, allowing you to fry eggs without using oil.

✅Easy to Clean: After use, simply wipe the cookware clean with a damp cloth or paper towel, making cooking both fun and easy while protecting your hands.

✅Space-Saving: These pans can be stacked together, saving up to 75% of storage space, perfect for kitchens with limited space.

✅Detachable Safety Handle: The two-point matrix safety structure makes it easy and convenient to attach and detach the handle, allowing you to switch seamlessly between cookware, tableware, and oven containers.

💡TIPS

①Avoid dry heating, as it may reduce the non-stick performance. Always add oil before heating.

②To extend the product's lifespan, use wooden or silicone utensils.

③Redchef pans heat quickly and evenly. Cook on low to medium heat and avoid flames exceeding the pan's base to protect the handle. For silicone handles, you can remove them during cooking to prevent discoloration.

📦PACKAGE

- 9 Pcs Set：20cm frying pan + 18cm Milk Pan + 20cm Milk Pan + 20cm Silicone Lid + 18cm Fridge Storage Lid + 20cm Fridge Storage Lid + Removable Handle + Pan Protector*2

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "💁‍♀️CUSTOMER CARE & QUALITY GUARANTEE: - Suitable for All Stove Including Induction - 1 Year Seller Warranty - 15 Days Return Policy. - 3 days delivery 👍FEATURES: Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe. Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans. ✅Oven Safe: The product comes with a detachable handle, allowing it to be used in the oven after removing the handle. The Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, making it more durable and heat-resistant compared to standard PTFE-coated pans, which can only handle up to 250°C. ✅Dishwasher Safe: After removing the handle, the cookware can be placed directly in the dishwasher. The ceramic coating on the bottom of the pan ensures it won’t be corroded by detergents. ✅Non-Stick: The ceramic coating provides excellent non-stick performance, allowing you to fry eggs without using oil. ✅Easy to Clean: After use, simply wipe the cookware clean with a damp cloth or paper towel, making cooking both fun and easy while protecting your hands. ✅Space-Saving: These pans can be stacked together, saving up to 75% of storage space, perfect for kitchens with limited space. ✅Detachable Safety Handle: The two-point matrix safety structure makes it easy and convenient to attach and detach the handle, allowing you to switch seamlessly between cookware, tableware, and oven containers. 💡TIPS ①Avoid dry heating, as it may reduce the non-stick performance. Always add oil before heating. ②To extend the product's lifespan, use wooden or silicone utensils. ③Redchef pans heat quickly and evenly. Cook on low to medium heat and avoid flames exceeding the pan's base to protect the handle. "desc": "

💁‍♀️CUSTOMER CARE & QUALITY GUARANTEE:

- Suitable for All Stove Including Induction

- 1 Year Seller Warranty

- 15 Days Return Policy.

- 3 days delivery

👍FEATURES:

Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe.

Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans.

✅Oven Safe: The product comes with a detachable handle, allowing it to be used in the oven after removing the handle. The Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, making it more durable and heat-resistant compared to standard PTFE-coated pans, which can only handle up to 250°C.

✅Dishwasher Safe: After removing the handle, the cookware can be placed directly in the dishwasher. The ceramic coating on the bottom of the pan ensures it won’t be corroded by detergents.

✅Non-Stick: The ceramic coating provides excellent non-stick performance, allowing you to fry eggs without using oil.

✅Easy to Clean: After use, simply wipe the cookware clean with a damp cloth or paper towel, making cooking both fun and easy while protecting your hands.

✅Space-Saving: These pans can be stacked together, saving up to 75% of storage space, perfect for kitchens with limited space.

✅Detachable Safety Handle: The two-point matrix safety structure makes it easy and convenient to attach and detach the handle, allowing you to switch seamlessly between cookware, tableware, and oven containers.

💡TIPS

①Avoid dry heating, as it may reduce the non-stick performance. Always add oil before heating.

②To extend the product's lifespan, use wooden or silicone utensils.

③Redchef pans heat quickly and evenly. Cook on low to medium heat and avoid flames exceeding the pan's base to protect the handle. For silicone handles, you can remove them during cooking to prevent discoloration.

📦PACKAGE

- 5 Pcs Set：1x 26cm Frying pan +1x 20cm Frying pan + 1x 20cm Milk Pan With Lid + 1x Detachable Handle.

- 16 Pcs Set：20cm frying pan + 26cm frying pan + 26cm Sauté Pan + 18cm Saucepan + 20cm Saucepan + 26cm Glass Lid+ 20cm Glass Lid + 18cm Fridge Storage Lid + 20cm Fridge Storage Lid + Removable Handle*2 + Silicone soup spoon + Silicone spatula + Pan Protector*3

🚚Delivery

Monday to Friday - Orders placed before 16:00 will be dispatched the same day

Saturday - Orders placed before 14:00 will be dispatched the same day.

Wipe it with a paper towel or rinse it with water. 4️⃣ Suitable for all stoves: Heats up quickly and evenly with an extended bottom design on all cooktops, including induction. 👍 After sales service & Guarantee: ecowin provides 12 months warranty from the date of purchase. Please don't hesitate to reach out if any quality problem. Ideal for Stir-frying



Perfect for stir-frying, this cookware set allows for quick and efficient cooking, preserving the nutrients and flavors of your ingredients.






Thick Bottom Design



The thick bottom design of these pans ensures even heat distribution, leading to better cooking results and energy efficiency.






Flat Bottom



The flat bottom design allows for easy storage and stability on any kitchen surface, enhancing the overall cooking experience.






Universal Compatibility



Designed to be compatible with both electromagnetic stoves and gas cookers, this versatile cookware set adapts to various cooking environments.

- Compatible with All Stovetops Including Induction

FEATURES:
Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE.It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom.It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe.Withstands temperatures up to 450°C—over 200°C higher than standard PTFE-coated pans.
✅Oven Safe: This product comes with a removable handle, so it can be used in the oven after the handle is removed.The Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, making it more durable and heat-resistant than standard PTFE-coated pans, which can only handle up to 250°

\n

C.
✅Dishwasher Safe: After removing the handle, the cookware can be directly put into the dishwasher.The ceramic coating on the bottom of the pan ensures that it will not be corroded by detergent.
✅Non-Stick: The ceramic coating provides excellent non-stick performance, allowing you to fry eggs without using oil.
✅Easy to Clean: After use, simply wipe the cookware with a damp cloth or tissue, making cooking fun and easy while protecting your hands.
✅Space Saving: These pans can be stacked together, saving up to 75% storage space, perfect for kitchens with limited space.
✅Removable Safety Handle: The two-point matrix safety structure makes it easy and convenient to install and remove the handle, allowing you to easily switch between cookware, tableware and oven containers.
TIPS
①Avoid dry heating, as it may reduce the non-stick performance.Always add oil before heating.
②To extend the service life of the product, use wooden or silicone utensils.
③Redchef pan heats up quickly and evenly.Cook on low to medium heat and avoid the heat exceeding the bottom of the pan to protect the handle.For the silicone handle, you can remove it during cooking to prevent discoloration.

🍳About Ecowin:

• Specialized In Kitchenware Since 1975. It Is A Light Luxury Kitchenware Brand.

• Eu Standard Quality： China Has Its Own Branded Stores, Supply For Top Supermarkets Of America And Europe For Years.

• All Ecowin Cookware Are Designed And Produced Under Our Brand Concept Of \"Health, Share, Love\", Which Makes You Can Enjoy Healthier And Easier Cooking To Share With Your Loved Ones Freely.

👉Features：

1️⃣ Die-cast cookware: Reinforced die-cast aluminum construction ensures long-term durability and reliability while maintaining a lightweight design, bringing convenience to your cooking experience.

2️⃣ Safe and nonstick: A top-level, harder nonstick granite material with 10x Ultra Non-stick performance ensures your daily cooking always safer and healthier.

3️⃣ Easy to clean: Recommend to hand wash the cookware as it is effortless to clean. Wipe it with a paper towel or rinse it with water.

4️⃣ Suitable for all stoves: Heats up quickly and evenly with an extended bottom design on all cooktops, including induction.

👍 After sales service & Guarantee: ecowin provides 12 months warranty from the date of purchase. Please don't hesitate to reach out if any quality problem. You will be guaranteed to get satisfying solution.

📦 Set Includes: 24cm frying pan without lid, 16cm milk pot with lid, 24cm soup pot with lid, 30cm wok with lid, 1pc random ladle , 1pc random spatula.

🚚 Delivery

Monday to Friday - Orders placed before 16:00 will be dispatched the same day

Saturday - Orders placed before 14:00 will be dispatched the same day.

Sunday - No delivery

📝 Please kindly leave us a 5⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐ review if you are satisfied with our products and service

⁉️ Use & Care:

• It is recommended to use silicone spatula, wooden spatula, or heat-resistant nylon spatula to protect the non-stick surface.

• Wiping with soft cloth and avoid using rough cleaning tools

• Cooking with medium heat.

📢📢📢Story about KANDA (カンダ 神田) – Since 1965 🇯🇵

We’re not just about making pans – we’re about passing down craftsmanship.

Our story began in 1965 in Tsubame-Sanjo, Japan, a place known for handmade metalwork.

For decades, we’ve been combining traditional skills with modern innovation to create kitchen tools that last.

Quality is at the heart of everything we do – because great cooking starts with great tools.

Craftsmanship, passed down. Always.

📌📌📌Excellent Service

🎆🎆🎆Product Features

⛓️ Premium Brazilian Iron

🛡️ Liquid Nitriding Tech

🔨 Hammered Surface

Natural texture helps reduce sticking – cook with less hassle.

🔥 Handles High Heat

Perfect for stir-fries, sears, and daily cooking.

💪 Solid & Steady

Feels sturdy in hand – ideal for everyday use.

WMF Brilliant Cookware Set, 4-piece includes:

-Saucepan 16cm

-High casserole 24cm with lid

-High casserole 20cm with lid

-High casserole 16cm with lid

BRILLIANT COOKWARE RANGE

WMF Brilliant cookware combines elegance and performance, featuring a stunning mirror-polished finish and refined lines. Designed for versatility, its range of pots meets every cooking need while adding a touch of sophistication to any kitchen.

Made from Cromargan®: stainless steel 18/10 with superior usage and care properties, with a neutral taste and odor, and excellent resistance to food acids. It is also scratch and impact resistant, ensuring its durability even with frequent and intensive use.

Safe for use in a dishwasher

Equipped with Transtherm® universal base for optimal heat distribution and retention for energy-saving cooking. Compatible with all hobs, including induction.

Wide pouring rim for drip-free pouring – for effortless serving and a spotless kitchen​

Fitted with glass lids that ensures easy monitoring while cooking

👍FEATURES:

Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. ✅Redchef Ceramic Rock Coating is a stable-performing non-metallic inorganic coating that is non-toxic, harmless, and free from PFAS, PFOA, and PTFE. It is non-stick, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, easy to clean, and features a stainless steel + ceramic coated bottom. It is compatible with all stovetops (induction, gas, ceramic) and dishwasher safe.

✅Oven Safe: The product comes with a detachable handle, allowing it to be used in the oven after removing the handle. The Redchef Ceramic Rock coating can withstand temperatures up to 450°C, making it more durable and heat-resistant compared to standard PTFE-coated pans, which can only handle up to 250°C.

✅Dishwasher Safe: After removing the handle, the cookware can be placed directly in the dishwasher. The ceramic coating on the bottom of the pan ensures it won’t be corroded by detergents.

✅Non-Stick: The ceramic coating provides excellent non-stick performance, allowing you to fry eggs without using oil.

✅Easy to Clean: After use, simply wipe the cookware clean with a damp cloth or paper towel, making cooking both fun and easy while protecting your hands.

✅Space-Saving: These pans can be stacked together, saving up to 75% of storage space, perfect for kitchens with limited space.

✅Detachable Safety Handle: The two-point matrix safety structure makes it easy and convenient to attach and detach the handle, allowing you to switch seamlessly between cookware, tableware, and oven containers.

- 16 Pcs Set：20cm frying pan + 26cm frying pan + 26cm Sauté Pan + 18cm Saucepan + 20cm Saucepan + 26cm Glass Lid+ 20cm Glass Lid + 18cm Fridge Storage Lid + 20cm Fridge Storage Lid + Removable Handle*2 + Silicone soup spoon + Silicone spatula + Pan Protector*3
